projects.title: AI Multi-Agent Recruitment SaaS
projects.subtitle: MAHAYUDH
projects.description: Architected a Jarvis-like system of 8 specialised AI agents handling the full recruitment pipeline — JD parsing, resume scoring, candidate matching, automated screening calls, ranking, and skill assessment — cutting simulated recruiter effort by ~60%.

projects.title: AI Traffic Optimizer
projects.subtitle: Computer Vision
projects.description: Designed a real-time multi-lane traffic monitoring system using OpenCV and a custom-trained deep learning model to detect congestion patterns and rule violations with ~89% accuracy. Built an automated signal control engine that dynamically recalculates timings.

certifications.title: AVISHKAAR Season 3
certifications.subtitle: Phase 2 — National Level Hackathon
certifications.description: Selected among top national teams for building a multi-agent AI SaaS recruitment platform at AITAM Tekkali.

certifications.title: Smart India Hackathon
certifications.subtitle: Level 1 — National Level
certifications.description: Cleared internal rounds to represent SR University nationally in the Govt. of India initiative.

certifications.title: SRU Startup Club
certifications.subtitle: Web Developer & Designer
certifications.description: Led end-to-end development of the club website (React.js, Node.js, AWS), increasing online event registrations by ~40%. Mentored 3 junior members.

certifications.title: AWS Academy & Google

about.description: 3rd-year CSE undergrad at SR University (Class of 2027) specialising in AI/ML and full-stack development. 150+ LeetCode problems solved; national/finalist rounds in 4 hackathons. Seeking a software engineering internship in backend, AI, or product engineering.
